task_description: Convert MSM Supermarket customer and delivery-partner mobile experience to a production-grade Flutter app while retaining the existing Next.js 15 backend and web admin portal. Includes versioned mobile API, bearer token auth, FCM push for delivery alerts, and comprehensive documentation.

verification.summary: All validation passes after review fixes. Backend: npm build succeeds, 37/38 tests pass (1 pre-existing scroll-preservation failure unrelated to this work). Flutter: analyze reports no issues, 80/80 tests pass. Prisma schema validates. Review issues addressed: FCM registration payload, auth interceptor retry+queue, server-side FCM dispatch, refresh token cleanup+limit, logout single-device scope, index fix, alarm audio documented.
